title: Ranwid the Elder
description:
You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]"We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!"

You do not know this man.

options.title: Give [a random potion you own]
options.requires: You must have at least one Potion

options.title: Give [a random tradable Relic you own]
options.requires: You must have at least one tradable Relic

conditions: Must have at least one Potion
Must have at least one tradable Relic
notes: Ranwid's preferences vary by choice: he mutters [sine]"Magnificent"[/sine] while consuming gold, [sine]"Exquisite"[/sine] while drinking a potion ([sine][blue]Glup glup glup[/blue][/sine]), and [sine]"Exemplary"[/sine] while examining and eating a relic. During the event, the player cannot voluntarily remove Potions from their inventory.
